subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Repeatedly the illustrious American believers send missives, desiring to go to Iran and visit the native land of the Blessed Beauty... Yahya is in Cyprus and his son, Ridvan-‘Alí, has joined a [Christian] church.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات امریکائیها متصل کاغذ مینویسند و میخواهند به ایران بروند و وطن جمال مبارک را زیارت کنند
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
